query:
INSERT INTO services (title, slug, description, shortDescription, `order`, published, metaTitle, metaDescription, metaKeywords, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES ('BIM Coordination', 'bim-coordination', '

Professional BIM Coordination Services

Our expert BIM coordination services ensure seamless integration of all building systems.

What We Offer

  • 3D model development and management
  • Clash detection and resolution
  • Coordination drawings
  • Multi-discipline integration
  • Real-time collaboration

We deliver precise, coordinated models that reduce construction conflicts and improve project efficiency.

', 'Expert BIM coordination for seamless multi-discipline integration', 1, true, 'BIM Coordination Services | IMI DESIGN', 'Professional BIM coordination services for construction projects. Expert clash detection and 3D modeling.', 'BIM coordination, 3D modeling, clash detection, construction', NOW(), NOW()), ('MEP Design & Modeling', 'mep-design-modeling', '

Comprehensive MEP Design Services

From concept to detailed design, we provide complete MEP solutions.

Services Include

  • Mechanical system design
  • Electrical system design
  • Plumbing system design
  • Fire safety system design
  • Energy efficiency optimization

Our designs comply with all codes and standards while optimizing performance and cost.

', 'Complete mechanical, electrical, and plumbing design solutions', 2, true, 'MEP Design Services | IMI DESIGN', 'Professional MEP design and modeling services for commercial and residential projects.', 'MEP design, mechanical design, electrical design, plumbing design', NOW(), NOW()), ('3D Visualization & Rendering', '3d-visualization-rendering', '

Professional 3D Visualization Services

Bring your projects to life with stunning 3D renderings and visualizations.

Deliverables

  • High-quality 3D renderings
  • Photorealistic visualizations
  • Animation walkthroughs
  • Virtual reality experiences
  • Marketing materials

Perfect for presentations, marketing, and client communication.

', 'Stunning 3D renderings and visualizations for your projects', 3, true, '3D Visualization Services | IMI DESIGN', 'Professional 3D rendering and visualization services for architects and developers.', '3D rendering, visualization, architecture, virtual reality', NOW(), NOW())
